items.title: Bitcoin gets its first working prototype of quantum-resistant wallet rescue tool
items.summary: Lightning Labs CTO Olaoluwa Osuntokun demos a prototype that could prevent millions of wallets from being frozen under a future quantum-defense upgrade

items.title: Anthropic loses first round in fight over Pentagon's 'supply chain risk' label
items.summary: “In our view, the equitable balance here cuts in favor of the government,” said a panel of judges from the District of Columbia Court of Appeals.

items.title: Quantum threat to Bitcoin is real, but manageable, according to Wall Street broker Bernstein
items.summary: The broker said advances in quantum computing are accelerating the timeline for crypto risk, but argued Bitcoin faces a multi-year upgrade cycle, not an existential crisis.

items.title: Mutation testing for the agentic era
items.summary: Code coverage is one of the most dangerous quality metrics in software testing. Many developers fail to realize that code coverage lies by omission: it measures execution, not verification. Test suites with high coverage can obfuscate the fact that critical functionality is untes

items.title: Try our new dimensional analysis Claude plugin
items.summary: We’re releasing a new Claude plugin for developing and auditing code that implements dimensional analysis, a technique we explored in our most recent blog post. Most LLM-based security skills ask the model to find bugs. Our new dimensional-analysis plugin for Claude Code takes a

items.title: Spotting issues in DeFi with dimensional analysis
items.summary: Using dimensional analysis, you can categorically rule out a whole category of logic and arithmetic bugs that plague DeFi formulas. No code changes required, just better reasoning! One of the first lessons in physics is learning to think in terms of dimensions. Physicists can oft

items.title: Michael Saylor says bitcoin has likely bottomed, quantum risk overblown
items.summary: Speaking at a Mizuho event, the Strategy (MSTR) executive chairman said the formation of banking credit pairing with digital credit will be the catalyst for the next bull market.

items.title: Bitcoin has 3–5 years to prepare for quantum risk, says Bernstein
items.summary: Bitcoin faces a future quantum threat, but Bernstein analysts say risks are concentrated in older wallets and exposed keys, and unlikely to cause existential disruption.

items.title: Bitcoin fades three-week highs as BTC price shrugs off Iran war ceasefire
items.summary: Bitcoin briefly reclaimed $72,000 on ceasefire news, but fading momentum, resistance and macro risks leave traders questioning the strength of the breakout.

items.title: CFTC presses case that sports betting is finance, seeks to block Arizona enforcement
items.summary: Federal lawsuit argues event contracts are swaps under U.S. law, not state-level gaming law, deepening a split with states that view the products as illegal gambling

items.title: XRP slips 4% as selling pressure builds despite ETF inflows
items.summary: Elevated volume and modest institutional buying fail to support price, with sellers continuing to dominate near resistance.

items.title: Bitcoin's next big move hinges on oil, and right now it's a total coin flip
items.summary: Analysts say a sustained 15%–16% decline in crude could revive Fed rate cut bets, sending BTC higher.

items.title: Bitcoin under $71,000, ETH, SOL, XRP drop as Iran ceasefire frays within 48 hours of being signed
items.summary: Tehran says three clauses of the ceasefire have been breached, oil is rebounding toward $97, and the Strait of Hormuz remains effectively closed despite the deal.

items.title: Yuga Labs settles lawsuit against artists accused of copying its NFTs
items.summary: Yuga Labs first filed a lawsuit in June 2022, accusing Ripps and Cahen of copying its Bored Ape Yacht Club cartoon ape images and selling lookalike NFTs.

items.title: Canary Capital submits application for US-based spot PEPE ETF
items.summary: Canary Capital is preparing to launch an ETF tracking Pepe’s price, despite the token trading 85% below its December 2024 all-time high.

items.title: 99.99% of Polymarket traders shouldn't quit their day jobs, data suggests
items.summary: While nearly 16% of Polymarket users are in profit, only a tiny fraction have made gains large and consistent enough to entertain walking away from their day job.

items.title: Chainalysis claims stablecoin volumes could hit over a quadrillion by 2035
items.summary: Adjusted stablecoin volume could reach $719 trillion by 2035, but the projection could be far higher if two macro catalysts come to pass, said Chainalysis.

items.title: Fed minutes open door to further rate cuts amid Iran war
items.summary: Some officials cautiously eyed a year-end rate cut, but others warned that upward adjustments might be needed if inflation remains above target levels.

items.title: Visa unveils commerce platform enabling autonomous AI shopping
items.summary: Visa is rolling out a platform that helps merchants make their product inventories discoverable and purchasable by AI agents.

items.title: Counterhacker exposes DPRK unit that made $1M a month working IT jobs
items.summary: The North Korean IT workers coordinated crypto payments through a server using a shared, easy-to-guess password “123456.”
